A tall, '''unidentified [[Calibop]]''' was one of the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] serving with [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] at [[Caluula Station]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
